description: Cloud-based customer relationship management platform that provides sales, service, marketing, and analytics solutions.
authentication: OAuth 2.0, SAML, JWT, and username/password flow.
self_serve: Yes (free Developer Edition and trial available).
api_surface: REST API, SOAP API, Bulk API, Streaming API, Metadata API, Tooling API, Apex REST, and more.
buildability: High – supports custom development via Lightning, Apex, Visualforce, and third‑party integrations.
main_blocker: High cost and complex licensing model.
